Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Windoors & Renovations to get the job done right.

“Windoors & Renovations did an amazing job replacing all the windows in my Sunset Heights home. The new windows look fantastic and have made a huge difference in keeping my house cool during the summer months. The team was professional, efficient, and very respectful of my property. Highly recommend!”

Maria G. Window Replacement
Jul 15, 2025

“I recently had a sliding glass door installed by Windoors & Renovations, and I'm very pleased with the results. The door looks great and opens smoothly. There was a minor issue with the screen, but they came back promptly to fix it. Overall, a positive experience.”

Ricardo L. Patio Door Installation
Jun 22, 2025

“My front door was old and drafty. Windoors & Renovations installed a beautiful new steel door that is not only more secure but also much more energy-efficient. The installation team was professional and courteous, and they cleaned up everything afterward. Great service!”

Susan K. Door Installation
May 10, 2025

“We had Windoors & Renovations install new windows in our Upper Valley home, and we couldn't be happier. The team was knowledgeable, efficient, and paid attention to every detail. The windows look fantastic and have significantly reduced the noise from the street.”

David M. Window Installation
Apr 1, 2025

“I had a storm door installed to protect my front door from the El Paso sun. The installation was quick and easy. The door looks great and provides extra security. I would definitely use Windoors & Renovations again.”

Elizabeth P. Storm Door Installation
Mar 18, 2025

“Excellent service from start to finish. The team at Windoors & Renovations helped me choose the perfect replacement windows for my Kern Place bungalow. The installation was flawless, and the new windows have made a huge difference in the comfort of my home.”

Robert S. Window Replacement
Feb 5, 2025
Windoors & Renovations

Trusted window and door installer professionals serving El Paso, TX and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
